title: Lightweight Cost Savings Calculator
description: Industrial-grade calculator for evaluating cost savings from lightweighting initiatives in logistics and manufacturing, aligned with Lean, Six Sigma, and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Current Weight per Unit (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Weight of the product or packaging before lightweighting.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of the product or packaging before lightweighting.

inputs.label: New Weight per Unit (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Weight of the product or packaging after lightweighting.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of the product or packaging after lightweighting.

inputs.label: Annual Volume (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced or shipped per year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of units produced or shipped per year.

inputs.label: Material Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Cost of raw material per kilogram.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of raw material per kilogram.

inputs.label: Waste Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of material wasted during production (scrap, rework).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of material wasted during production (scrap, rework).

inputs.label: Labor Hours per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct labor hours required to produce one unit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct labor hours required to produce one unit.

inputs.label: Energy Consumption per kg of Material
inputs.businessContext: Energy used to process one kilogram of material.

label_i18n.en: Energy Consumption per kg of Material

businessContext_i18n.en: Energy used to process one kilogram of material.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of direct costs allocated to overhead.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of direct costs allocated to overhead.

inputs.label: Material Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of material being lightweighted, affects processing and recyclability.

businessContext_i18n.en: Type of material being lightweighted, affects processing and recyclability.

inputs.label: Use Recycled Content
inputs.businessContext: Whether the new material includes recycled content, which may reduce cost and environmental impact.

businessContext_i18n.en: Whether the new material includes recycled content, which may reduce cost and environmental impact.

rules.message: New weight must be less than current weight to achieve savings.
Annual volume must be greater than zero.
Waste rate must be between 0% and 100%.

thresholds.message: Annual savings are low; consider larger volume or greater weight reduction.
Significant annual savings achieved; recommend further optimization.
Payback period exceeds 3 years; evaluate investment risk.

formulas.label: Weight Reduction per Unit
formulas.description: Difference between current and new weight.

formulas.label: Material Savings per Unit
formulas.description: Savings from reduced material usage, adjusted for waste.

formulas.label: Energy Savings per Unit
formulas.description: Savings from reduced energy consumption due to less material processing.

formulas.label: Labor Savings per Unit
formulas.description: Savings from reduced labor due to lighter material handling (estimated 10% reduction per kg saved).

formulas.label: Total Annual Savings
formulas.description: Primary result: sum of all savings multiplied by annual volume.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Waste Inefficiency
hiddenLossDrivers.description: High waste rate reduces effective material savings.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Low Volume
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Annual volume below 10,000 units limits total savings.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: High Overhead Rate
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Overhead above 30% may indicate indirect cost issues.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Material Type Premium
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Composite materials may have higher cost per kg, reducing savings.

suggestedActions.label: Increase Production Volume
suggestedActions.description: Scale up to leverage fixed cost reductions and improve savings.

suggestedActions.label: Reduce Waste Rate
suggestedActions.description: Implement Lean Six Sigma DMAIC to lower waste below 3%.

suggestedActions.label: Negotiate Shipping Rates
suggestedActions.description: Use weight reduction as leverage for lower freight contracts.

suggestedActions.label: Adopt Recycled Content
suggestedActions.description: Switch to recycled materials to further reduce cost and environmental impact.

suggestedActions.label: Automate Material Handling
suggestedActions.description: Reduce labor hours per unit through automation, especially for lighter parts.
